Compliance.description: FSCA licensed FSP 3416, non-life insurer, strong policy, no fines 2025/2026.

Product Value.description: Tiered car cover (Core/Classic/Executive), broad range, competitive pricing, transparent quotes.

Innovation.description: Self-service app/portal, SOS button, real-time claims, geo-coding, FutureFit 2030, Lloyd's syndicate.

Accessibility & Security.description: Digital app/portal access, POPIA compliant with stringent safeguards, phishing protection.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Theft/Hijacking from R350/mo; comprehensive car R400-R1500+/mo depending on vehicle

socialSentiment.summary: Strongly positive on HelloPeter (91% 5-star); isolated complaints on claims handling.
